title: webauthn.rs: register endpoint has no rate limiting
description: File: src/webauthn.rs (register_begin, register_complete, auth_begin, auth_complete). The /admin/webauthn/register/begin endpoint accepts admin password in plaintext without rate limiting. An attacker can brute-force the admin password via this endpoint. The /oauth/authorize endpoint has rate limiting (the diff shows it checks at line 584), but the webauthn registration endpoints bypass it entirely.
